SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARTHY, ABHAYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURO, INC. $378.59 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $423.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
